## Type of Change

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm check-env`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Auth/cookie/token changes reviewed
- [ ] Rate limiting considered for new public endpoints
- [ ] Env docs updated for new config

## Deployment Notes

- [ ] No deployment impact
- [ ] Render env vars updated
- [ ] Branch strategy impact (`dev` vs `main`) documented
